competitor_intelligence.their_secret: creating high-quality, engaging content that is both informative and entertaining

creating a sense of mystery or intrigue

my_gaps: lack of consistency in content style and quality
not utilizing hooks and patterns effectively
my_channel_diagnosis.retention_problem: viewers are dropping off due to lack of engagement and inconsistent content quality
